source.description: Six-panel raster marker contact sheet generated for the June 14, 2026 cartoon party balloon archive lesson.
source.notes: The contact sheet must keep one balloon cluster pose, string curve, face placement, and marker texture from construction through the finished doodle.

process_strategy: The sequence establishes the balloon cluster, knots, strings, face, confetti, marker colors, and highlights before the final panel only reinforces existing ink, fills, and small shine marks.

final_elements.name: main round balloon
final_elements.description: A large round balloon centered in the doodle.

final_elements.name: two side balloons
final_elements.description: Two smaller balloons tucked behind the main balloon.

final_elements.name: balloon knots and strings
final_elements.description: Small tied knots and curved strings hanging below the balloons.

final_elements.name: thick black outline
final_elements.description: A bold marker outline around the balloons, knots, and strings.

final_elements.name: happy face
final_elements.description: Two eyes and a smiling mouth on the main balloon.

final_elements.name: confetti marks
final_elements.description: Small dots and dash marks floating around the balloons.

final_elements.name: bright balloon fills
final_elements.description: Pink, teal, and yellow marker fills inside the already drawn balloons.

final_elements.name: small white highlights
final_elements.description: Tiny shine marks on the existing balloon shapes and eyes.

frames.visible_job: Places the main round balloon and two smaller side balloons.
Adds balloon knots and curved strings under the already placed balloon shapes.
Darkens only the already drawn balloon, knot, and string edges into a thick marker outline.
Adds a happy face on the main balloon and simple confetti marks around the bunch.
Fills the established balloons with marker colors and adds tiny highlights on existing balloon and face shapes.

final_step.visible_job: Retraces existing outlines, deepens balloon fills, and sharpens the face, strings, confetti, and highlights already on the page.

rejection_checks: No balloon, string, face, confetti mark, color fill, or highlight should first appear in the final image.
No frame may thicken, fill, or clean a shape that was not already visible.
No adjacent frame should look unchanged at card size.
The final image must keep the same balloon cluster pose, scale, and placement as the step frames.
